---
title: "00 · Introduction"
subtitle: "CBSE / NCERT Class 12 Mathematics (Board Year) · 13 chapters · The final school year"
---

## What this tier is for

This is the **CBSE / NCERT Class 12** track — the final board year. It
walks the NCERT textbook chapter by chapter and ends with the toolkit
the rest of mathematics, physics, economics, and engineering will lean
on.

Class 12 is the year mathematics becomes **operative**: matrices solve
linear systems, derivatives find optima, integrals measure
accumulation, vectors make geometry algebraic, and probability
distributes outcomes over space.

By the end of Class 12 you can:

- Classify **relations** (reflexive, symmetric, transitive,
  equivalence) and **functions** (one-one, onto, invertible,
  composite).
- Compute principal values of **inverse trigonometric functions** and
  apply their identities.
- Add, multiply, transpose, and find inverses of **matrices**;
  evaluate **determinants** and use them to solve linear systems by
  matrix inverse and Cramer's rule.
- Test **continuity** and **differentiability**, apply chain rule,
  product rule, and logarithmic / implicit / parametric
  differentiation.
- Apply derivatives to find **tangents, normals, rates of change,
  monotonicity, maxima and minima**.
- Compute **indefinite and definite integrals** by substitution,
  parts, partial fractions, and standard forms.
- Use definite integrals to find **areas under curves** and between
  curves.
- Solve **first-order, first-degree differential equations** —
  variable separable, homogeneous, and linear forms.
- Add, scale, dot, and cross **vectors**; use them in geometry and
  physics.
- Find equations of **lines and planes in 3D** and the angles and
  distances between them.
- Solve **linear programming problems** graphically.
- Apply **conditional probability, Bayes' theorem**, and analyse
  **discrete random variables** and the **binomial distribution**.

## The lessons

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A[01 · Relations & Functions]
    A --> B[02 · Inverse Trig]
    CA[03a · Matrices] --> CB[03b · Matrix Operations]
    CB --> DA[04a · Determinants]
    DA --> DB[04b · Inverse & Cramer]
    EA[05a · Continuity] --> EB[05b · Differentiability]
    EB --> FA[06a · Tangents Normals Rates]
    FA --> FB[06b · Maxima Minima]
    EB --> GA[07a · Indefinite Integrals]
    GA --> GB[07b · Integration Techniques]
    GB --> GC[07c · Definite Integrals]
    GC --> H[08 · Area Under Curves]
    GB --> I[09 · Differential Equations]
    JA[10a · Vector Algebra] --> JB[10b · Dot/Cross Product]
    JA --> KA[11a · Lines in 3D]
    KA --> KB[11b · Planes in 3D]
    L[12 · Linear Programming]
    MA[13a · Conditional Probability & Bayes] --> MB[13b · Random Variables]
```

## Lesson list

1. [**01 · Relations and Functions**](01-relations-functions-types/index.qmd)
2. [**02 · Inverse Trigonometric Functions**](02-inverse-trig-functions/index.qmd)
3. [**03a · Matrices (Definition and Types)**](03a-matrices-intro/index.qmd)
4. [**03b · Matrix Operations and Transpose**](03b-matrix-operations/index.qmd)
5. [**04a · Determinants**](04a-determinants/index.qmd)
6. [**04b · Matrix Inverse and Cramer's Rule**](04b-matrix-inverse-cramers/index.qmd)
7. [**05a · Continuity**](05a-continuity/index.qmd)
8. [**05b · Differentiability and Differentiation Rules**](05b-differentiability-and-rules/index.qmd)
9. [**06a · Application of Derivatives (Tangents, Normals, Rates)**](06a-tangents-normals-rates/index.qmd)
10. [**06b · Maxima and Minima**](06b-maxima-minima/index.qmd)
11. [**07a · Indefinite Integrals**](07a-indefinite-integrals/index.qmd)
12. [**07b · Integration Techniques**](07b-integration-techniques/index.qmd)
13. [**07c · Definite Integrals and Their Properties**](07c-definite-integrals-properties/index.qmd)
14. [**08 · Application of Integrals (Areas)**](08-area-under-curves/index.qmd)
15. [**09 · Differential Equations**](09-differential-equations/index.qmd)
16. [**10a · Vector Algebra**](10a-vector-algebra/index.qmd)
17. [**10b · Dot Product, Cross Product, and Applications**](10b-dot-cross-product-applications/index.qmd)
18. [**11a · Lines in 3D**](11a-lines-in-3d/index.qmd)
19. [**11b · Planes in 3D**](11b-planes-in-3d/index.qmd)
20. [**12 · Linear Programming**](12-linear-programming/index.qmd)
21. [**13a · Conditional Probability and Bayes' Theorem**](13a-conditional-probability-bayes/index.qmd)
22. [**13b · Random Variables and Probability Distributions**](13b-random-variables-distributions/index.qmd)

::: {.callout-note}
This page reflects the snapshot of `_curriculum.yml` at the time of build.
Lesson statuses there are the source of truth.
:::
